_note: Learned caption-LANGUAGE voice (Phase 7.2). Consumed by Stage 6 as FEW-SHOT examples in the hook/title prompt when enabled=true. OCR-derived: language style is reliable; visual styling (font/colour/position) is NOT captured. Review + set enabled=true to use.
examples: Tylil not on content suburbbaby don t let Rakai gas yoU bro clipgoatturtle
Tylil not on content suburbbaby don t let Rakai gas vou bro
Tylil not on content suburbbaby don t let Rakai gas you bro M P N 4 clipgoatturtle
stop patting my back like TikO dizhotys THIETES
caveats: OCR-derived from burned-in overlays; may mix editor captions with streamer/chat overlay text. Language reliable, visual styling not.
voice_summary: A casual, conversational Gen-Z voice that uses repetitive, meme-like hooks to transition into personal anecdotes or calls to action, characterized by loose grammar and phonetic slang.
casing_rule: mostly lowercase with mixed casing for emphasis or handles
hook_phrasings: don t let rakai gas you
stop patting my back im ya homeboy
punctuation: minimal punctuation, frequent use of spaces instead of apostrophes (e.g., don t), no emojis, occasional ALL CAPS for emphasis (PERIOD, Ouuuuu)
